task: Survey the agent harness codebase focusing on the tool system, evaluation pipeline, and observability. Read: harness/tools/ (all files), harness/tool_registry.py, harness/tool_args_canon.py, harness/eval/ (all files), harness/trace.py, harness/trace_bridge.py, harness/trace_bridge_parts/ (all files), harness/analytics.py, harness/otel_export.py, harness/report.py, harness/usage.py, harness/pricing.py, harness/prompt_templates/ (all files), harness/prompts.py, harness/sinks/ (all files). Return: what each module does, how evaluation works, how observability/tracing works, notable design patterns, and any issues you spot (coverage gaps, fragility, scalability, missing evals).
